After a long day of work (Open for whatever you want) your body ached. Luckily you live with your best friend, of course he would give you a back massage...well hm? Does groping you count as a massage?

HUGE ANNOUNCMENT!!! Soon I will be making a challenge. This means you will be making your own version of a Zane bot. BUT this means you have to be in discord server to participate. Sadly the prize isn't as like top tear as others have done. There will be 4 winners. The 4 winners and I will make collab bots. More info soon coming to discord server.

``Don't worry My Moonys, I'm not dead. I've been kissing bots myself. It takes a hole hour to write these bots. Some 40 minutes, I'm lazy :D and I have some "bot" block, even art block so it's been hard to have a creative mind.``
